title: skenos #4636
definition:
1) a tabernacle, a tent
 2) metaph. of the human body, in which the soul dwells as in a tent,
    and which is taken down at death
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) a tabernacle, a tent
 2) metaph. of the human body, in which the soul dwells as in a tent,
    and which is taken down at death

    NASB:  a tent, fig. for the body:
